name: RBAC Test Harness
description: Interactive test page for every RBAC permission pattern
details: Comprehensive test harness that exercises all RBAC patterns: collection-level deny, ownership ('own'), writableFields, immutable fields, userBound fields, unclaimed-or-own claiming, team-scoped permissions, and admin-only collections. Each test has buttons that trigger allowed or denied operations, with built-in toast notifications for permission errors.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { rbacTestSchemas } from './schemas/rbac-test-schema'
Add to App.tsx: import RbacTestPage from './pages/RbacTestPage'
patterns: Tests writableFields restriction (member can't update excluded fields)
All denied operations trigger built-in RBAC toast notifications
